title: Layer injection engine
goal: Apply steering vectors at configured transformer layers with deterministic behavior.
constraints: No-steering code path must remain baseline-stable in tests.
definition_of_done: Injection layer targeting is covered by unit tests.
Uniform and per-layer multipliers are supported.
Runtime emits active layer list and effective multiplier metadata.
rollback_note: If generation quality regresses, disable injection by feature flag and keep API contract unchanged.
